message:
fix(tui): throttle ambient effects and reduce tick rate to eliminate flashing

The TUI was experiencing visible flashing and high CPU usage from three
compounding issues: clear_rect resetting every cell attribute every frame
(redundant with ftui's reset_for_frame), ambient effects changing every
cell's bg every frame defeating the buffer diff engine, and an excessive
60fps tick rate.

Replace clear_rect with a lightweight Paragraph bg fill, throttle ambient
effects to every 6th frame (~5fps), and reduce the tick rate to 30fps.
Animation constants adjusted proportionally to preserve visual timing.
Terminal output reduced approximately 6-10x.

br-30zw7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
